The process

How It Works

Six steps. No missed parcels. Returns included.

1🛍️
Order placed — choose location
Shopper orders online and selects a Sitter delivery location at checkout.
2🚚
Delivery attempt
Courier attempts home delivery or routes directly to the chosen Sitter.
3🏠
Sent to local sitter
Parcel redirected to the nearest verified Sitter in the network.
4🔒
Secure holding
Sitter holds parcel safely. Shopper is notified immediately.
5✅
Customer collects
Shopper picks up at their convenience within the agreed window.
6↩️
Returns handled
Returns are handled through the Sitter network — simple, tracked, and confirmed.

Trusted across community, logistics and retail

Demonstration partners shown for illustrative purposes

🚛 GreenRoute Logistics
📦 ParcelFlow
🤝 CareLink Ireland
🏪 RetailHub Group
🌍 Community Support Network
🧡 AgeWell Services

deliverysitter📦com

Which type of Sitter are you?

Different settings, same trusted purpose.

🏡
Residential Sitter
A trusted person in a home setting who receives and holds parcels for nearby neighbours. Flexible, community-based, and welfare-compatible.
→
🏢
Concierge Sitter
A resident within an apartment building who acts as the trusted Sitter contact point, using their own apartment as the secure storage location.
→
🏫
Commercial / Institutional Sitter
A school, GAA club, community centre, charity, or library offering its premises as a verified parcel hold point — and a new source of fundraising income.
→
🔒 This is a demonstration environment. All profiles, names, and data are simulated. No real personal data is collected or stored.
deliverysitter📦com

Deliveries that work
around you.

Stop missing parcels. Collect when it suits you.

How DeliverySitter works for you

Designed to complement your existing home delivery — adding a trusted local option when you need it
All parcels are handled within a structured and tracked system designed to ensure security, visibility and safe handover
Your parcel stays in one safe place until you're ready to collect
Use it when you need it — no commitment required

How it works

1
Choose a Sitter
Select your nearest verified Sitter at checkout or in the app.
2
Delivery goes to your Sitter
Your parcel is delivered directly to the Sitter address.
3
You're notified instantly
Notification the moment your parcel is received and secured.
4
Collect at your convenience
Pick up within the agreed window — no queues, no rescheduling.

Your DeliverySitter Address

📮 Get a DeliverySitter address you can use for all your deliveries

Use it as your default address, a backup if you're not home, or when you're away. One address. Total flexibility.

🏠Use as my default delivery addressPrimary
🔄Use as a backup when I'm not homeBackup
✈️Use for a temporary location while I'm awayTemporary
💡 Check if your retailer supports DeliverySitter — or notify them that you'd like the option at checkout.

What you need

Active delivery address in a covered area
Mobile number for parcel notifications
Agreement to collection window terms

Supports available

Flexible delivery options — choose your Sitter at checkout
Local collection convenience — no depot queues or repeat journeys
Improved delivery success — first-attempt rates significantly higher

Ready to get started?

Walk through the guided onboarding — takes about 2 minutes.

🔒 This is a demonstration environment. All profiles, names, and data are simulated. No real personal data is collected or stored.
deliverysitter📦com

Be there for your community.
On your own terms.

A flexible, supportive income opportunity — built around your life.

Designed to be simple and supportive

You stay at home — no driving, no routes, no pressure
You never handle payments or financial transactions
All parcels are handled within a structured and tracked system designed to ensure security, visibility and safe handover
You only see what you need — a name and a collection code

How it works

1
Register and verify
Complete your profile and a simple identity check — we guide you through every step.
2
Set your availability
Choose the hours and days that work for you. Change them anytime.
3
Receive parcels
Accept deliveries at your door during your stated hours.
4
Hold securely
Keep the parcel safe. The shopper is notified automatically — you don't need to do anything else.
5
Shopper collects
Hand over on a secure code. Done. Your earnings are recorded automatically.

What you need

A secure space at home to hold parcels (a cupboard, hallway, or designated spot)
Some regular availability during the week
Basic identity verification — we make this straightforward
Willingness to follow simple handling guidelines
⭐ Becoming a Preferred Sitter

To become a Preferred Sitter, additional steps may be required such as:

→Garda vetting
→Working with an approved support agency
→Additional verification and compliance checks

Supports available

Social welfare compatibility guidance — your income structured to protect your entitlements
Revenue and income guidance — clear advice on how Sitter earnings are treated
Access to support organisations — including age-related support and inclusion supports
BuddyUp support pairing — matched with an experienced Sitter to help you get started

Ready to become a Sitter?

Walk through the guided onboarding — takes about 2 minutes.

🔒 This is a demonstration environment. All profiles, names, and data are simulated. No real personal data is collected or stored.
deliverysitter📦com

The neighbour your
building already trusts.

Earn flexible income from home — serving the community around you.

Designed to work within your home

You use your own apartment — no special setup or separate room required
All parcels are handled within a structured and tracked system designed to ensure security, visibility and safe handover
You only accept deliveries during your stated availability
When shared between two residents, each Sitter covers their own agreed hours

How it works

1
Register as a building Sitter
Set up your apartment as a verified Sitter location — we handle the building registration.
2
Set your availability
Define when you're available to accept deliveries. Pair with a co-Sitter for broader cover if you choose.
3
Receive deliveries
Logistics operators and neighbours' parcels arrive directly to your apartment door.
4
Hold and log
Each parcel is logged in the app automatically. Resident is notified instantly.
5
Resident collects
Hand over on a secure QR code. Your earnings are recorded automatically.

What you need

Your own apartment within the building
A secure storage space within your home for parcel holding
Regular availability — even part-time works well
Basic identity verification — we guide you through it

Supports available

Social welfare compatibility guidance — your income structured to protect your entitlements
Revenue and income guidance — clear advice on how Sitter earnings are treated
Access to support organisations — including age-related support and inclusion supports
BuddyUp support pairing — matched with an experienced Sitter to help you get started

Ready to become a Concierge Sitter?

Walk through the guided onboarding — takes about 2 minutes.

🔒 This is a demonstration environment. All profiles, names, and data are simulated. No real personal data is collected or stored.
deliverysitter📦com

Building on the trust your
community already has in you.

Build on the trust you already have within your community by creating a simple, sustainable way to support fundraising and generate additional income.

deliverysitter.com works alongside your existing activities, helping you streamline fundraising with minimal additional effort.

Designed to fit your organisation

All parcels are handled within a structured and tracked system designed to ensure security, visibility and safe handover
Your premises are registered as a verified hold point — no courier depot operations
Suitable for schools, GAA clubs, community centres, libraries, charities, and faith organisations
Greater flexibility in your operating hours can increase participation and income potential

Fundraising Opportunity

💚 A new way to fund your organisation

DeliverySitter can provide a new way for your organisation to generate fundraising income with minimal additional workload, using your existing community relationships. No new staff. No significant infrastructure. Just your existing space and the community trust you've already built.

How it works

1
Apply to register
Submit your organisation's details and opening hours for verification.
2
Set your capacity
Define how many parcels you can comfortably hold at any one time.
3
Receive parcels
Logistics operators deliver to your designated area during your opening hours.
4
Every parcel is logged automatically
Scan-in on receipt. Your team does nothing extra beyond handing over at collection.
5
Community collects
Customers collect using a secure QR code. Fundraising income recorded automatically.

What you need

Established and registered community organisation
A designated area within your premises for parcel holding
Regular staffed opening hours — any days and times work
Willingness to complete a short onboarding and compliance briefing

Supports available

Fundraising support — dedicated guidance on maximising your income potential
Community engagement support — tools to promote your Sitter status locally
Simple operational setup — clear step-by-step guidance for your team

Register your organisation

Walk through the guided onboarding — takes about 2 minutes.

deliverysitter📦com

Your customers deserve better
than a missed delivery card.

Offer the option. Reduce returns. Keep customers happy.

How DeliverySitter fits your operation

Works alongside your existing courier contracts — no changes required to current fulfilment
All parcels are handled within a structured and tracked system designed to ensure security, visibility and safe handover
Your customers simply choose a Sitter at checkout — the rest is automated
Returns handled through the same Sitter network — reducing friction for your customers

How it works

1
Integrate at checkout
Add the DeliverySitter option alongside standard delivery at checkout.
2
Customer selects their Sitter
Shopper chooses their nearest verified Sitter at the point of purchase.
3
Courier delivers to Sitter
Your existing courier delivers directly to the Sitter address — no route changes.
4
Delivery confirmed and closed
Photo custody record available. Customer collects. Delivery success recorded.

What you need

Active e-commerce or fulfilment operation
API or webhook integration capability
Agreement to display the Sitter option at checkout

Supports available

Reduced failed deliveries — measurable improvement in first-attempt success rates
Returns management — simplified returns through the existing Sitter network
Customer experience improvement — fewer complaints, higher satisfaction scores
Delivery visibility — real-time status for every parcel in the network

Ready to integrate?

Walk through the guided onboarding — takes about 2 minutes.

🔒 This is a demonstration environment. All profiles, names, and data are simulated. No real personal data is collected or stored.
deliverysitter📦com

Every failed delivery is a cost
you don't have to carry.

Reduce failures. Improve efficiency. Build trust with your clients.

How DeliverySitter extends your capability

Designed to complement your existing home delivery operation — not replace it
All parcels are handled within a structured and tracked system designed to ensure security, visibility and safe handover
Photo-confirmed custody transfer at the Sitter door protects your chain of custody
Full audit trail generated automatically — no extra admin for your drivers

How it works

1
API integration
Connect your dispatch system via our secure API — straightforward for existing platforms.
2
Identify redirects
Failed or pre-planned Sitter deliveries are flagged automatically in your driver app.
3
Route to nearest Sitter
Driver is navigated directly to the nearest verified Sitter on their current route.
4
Photo-confirmed handover
Custody transfer recorded with photo and timestamp. Chain of custody complete.
5
Audit trail closed
Shopper collects. Record closes. Full audit log available to your client on request.

What you need

Active delivery operations in a covered area
API integration capability within your dispatch system
Signed data sharing and custody protocol
Operations team briefed on Sitter handover process

Supports available

Delivery analytics dashboard — fleet-level performance data in real time
Failed delivery reduction insights — identify patterns and optimise your routes
Photo-confirmation custody chain — protect your chain of custody end to end
Route optimisation support — Sitter delivery built into your routing logic
Audit-ready tracking — every parcel, every step, exportable on demand

Ready to integrate?

Walk through the guided onboarding — takes about 2 minutes.

🔒 This is a demonstration environment. All profiles, names, and data are simulated. No real personal data is collected or stored.
deliverysitter📦com

Support the people you work with
into real, flexible income.

Partner with us. Empower your participants.

How the partnership works

Your organisation is not the employer of the Sitters you support — income flows directly through the platform
All participant activity is tracked within a structured system designed for visibility, compliance, and safeguarding
You retain full visibility of your participants' activity through your own dashboard
Safeguarding, compliance, and programme reporting are built in

How it works

1
Apply to partner
Register your organisation and your designated safeguarding lead.
2
Onboard your participants
Register supported participants as Sitter candidates through your agency dashboard.
3
Monitor progress
Track onboarding, activity, and earnings in real time from your dashboard.
4
Report outcomes
Monthly impact and outcomes reporting is generated automatically for your organisation.

What you need

Registered organisation (charity, social enterprise, or statutory body)
Designated safeguarding lead
Active participant base suitable for Sitter roles
Willingness to follow onboarding and compliance protocols

Supports available

Participant onboarding tools — streamlined registration for your team and your Sitters
Participant visibility — full oversight of activity, earnings, and status from your dashboard
Safeguarding alignment — reporting and controls built to meet your obligations
Programme integration — outcomes data formatted for your funders and reporting requirements

Ready to partner?

Walk through the guided onboarding — takes about 2 minutes.
